texto: Son, are you happy? I don't mean to pry,but do you dream of Heaven?Have you ever wanted to die?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Tim Burton que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Son, are you happy? I don't mean to pry,but do you dream of Heaven?Have you ever wanted to die?”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, vida, reflexao, com foco em reflexao.

texto: It's good as an artist to always remember to see things in a new, weird way.
explicacao: Citação de Tim Burton sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It's good as an artist to always remember to see things in a new, weird way.” articula reflexao, artist, weird em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como weird e remember.
